Smara Organic Perfumery
Home The Fragrance Ingredients Our Craft The Ritual

Drawn from the earth

A perfume that
remembers the soil it grew from.

Smara is an all-natural eau de parfum, handcrafted in small batches from organic botanicals. No synthetics, no shortcuts — only the raw, living scent of the wild.

Discover the scent Our craft

Our philosophy

Made by hand. Grown, not engineered.

100% Botanical

Every drop is built from organic essential oils, resins, and absolutes — never synthetic musks or fixatives.

Small-Batch

Blended by hand in batches of forty, then rested for six weeks so the notes can settle and marry.

Kind by Nature

Vegan, cruelty-free, and bottled in refillable amber glass. Good for your skin, gentle on the earth.

The botanicals

Twelve raw ingredients. Nothing hidden.

Top First Breath
  • Cold-pressed Bergamot
  • Wild Neroli
  • Green Cardamom
Heart The Bloom
  • Damask Rose Otto
  • Night Jasmine
  • Orris Root
Base The Earth
  • Mysore Sandalwood
  • Smoked Vetiver
  • Wild Oakmoss

From flower to flacon

Four slow steps, the old way.

01

Harvest

Flowers and roots gathered at dawn from organic, biodynamic growers.

02

Distill

Slow steam-distilled in copper, the old way, to keep the scent alive.

03

Blend

Layered by the nose alone — no formula software, only patience.

04

Rest

Aged six weeks in darkness before it ever meets your skin.

Join the harvest

Be first to know when the next batch is poured.

We make Smara only when the botanicals are at their finest. Leave your email and we'll write when a new harvest is ready.

© 2026 Smara — Handcrafted in small batches from organic botanicals.
